description: Lap 1 bumps the vulnerable minimatch@3.0.4 pin to 3.1.4 (real fixed version for the 0.x-3.x advisory range, confirmed live against osv-scanner 2.4.0). osv-scanner goes clean (exit 0) on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys.

interactions.agent_output: Read seed/package-lock.json. minimatch@3.0.4 carries 4 disclosed CVEs (GHSA-23c5-xmqv-rm74, GHSA-3ppc-4f35-3m26, GHSA-7r86-cg39-jmmj, GHSA-f8q6-p94x-37v3), all fixed at or before 3.1.4 in the 0.x-3.x line. Bumping the pin.
interactions.notes: The fix — osv-scanner now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
